response.text:

rationale: Your SoC fraction of 0.45 is below my minimum sharing threshold of 0.5, and my belief indicates network-wide energy constraints require me to prioritize stabilizing my own critically low state before fulfilling outbound requests.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.5, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Geographic neighbors are energy-constrained and applying conservative sharing policies; network-wide low-energy state requires I prioritize requesting energy to stabilize my critically low SoC before resuming any outbound sharing..
